---
title: "Notas EST-133. Informática II-2018"
author: 'Docente: Alvaro Chirino Gutierrez'
date: "21/11/2018"
output:
  prettydoc::html_pretty:
    theme: hpstr
    highlight: github
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
library(knitr)
library(gapminder)
```

# Notas 

```{r,echo=F}
setwd("~/Dropbox/UMSA_docente/2018/_II/Estadistica-inf/R-exam/parcial2")
load("notas.Rdata")
```

```{r,echo=F}
kable(notas)
```
